task_text: TAKE CARE OF THE INBOX QUEUE.

next_step.current_state: Sender handle is admin-trusted on Discord. Need recipient identity and outbox schema before writing email.

Write one outbound email file in outbox

next_step.current_state: Search found two Eva Willems contacts; must resolve ambiguity before sending any email.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: If still ambiguous, report clarification needed for msg_001
next_step.observation: Name lookup returned two distinct contact records for Eva Willems.

next_step.current_state: Need second Eva record to confirm ambiguity and decide outcome per guardrail.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Compare distinguishing context against inbox request
Report clarification due to ambiguous contact match
next_step.observation: contacts/cont_009.json identifies Eva Willems at aperture-ai-labs with email eva.willems@aperture-ai-labs.example.com.

next_step.current_state: Processed the first pending inbox item as required, but cannot safely complete requested action because recipient identity is ambiguous across two contacts with same name.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Wait for clarification on which Eva Willems (account/email) is intended
Then send one correctly addressed outbound email
Continue queue with next message only after msg_001 is resolved
next_step.observation: Both contacts/cont_009.json and contacts/cont_010.json are Eva Willems with different emails/accounts, while msg_001 gives only the name.

function.message: I started with the lowest pending inbox item (inbox/msg_001.txt) and stopped because the requested recipient is ambiguous: there are two contacts named Eva Willems with different emails/accounts. I need clarification on which Eva to email before taking action.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox one-at-a-time rule from inbox/README.md and ambiguity guardrail from docs/inbox-task-processing.md ('If multiple contacts could match, stop for clarification instead of guessing').
function.outcome_justification: The instruction in inbox/msg_001.txt says to email 'Eva Willems' but contact search resolves to two valid records (cont_009 and cont_010). Proceeding would require guessing recipient identity, which is explicitly disallowed by docs/inbox-task-processing.md.
